Paroles :
Ce matin j‚Äôai pas les mots c‚Äôest difficile

Je ne jouerais pas
Si on disait 
Qu‚Äôon a le temps

snippet.title: Ta Joela | Studiosessie 374 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
Dikke billuhgang in de bilding! Ta Joela heeft barz?! Bij SUPERGAANDE zie je hem freestylen, maar houdt ie zich ook staande in de studio van Rotjoch?

#TAJOELA #STUDIOSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Volg ons ook op:

snippet.title: Dikke: ‚ÄúIk ging je bijna klappen‚Äù | SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE ft. Dikke
snippet.description:
ABONNEER op Supergaande als je altijd op de hoogte wilt blijven!
https://Supergaande.lnk.to/abonneer

Bekijk meer van SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ShM8bOZM2Uk&list=PLlxjiU7Uh8S7BPPKCIFW2qO1wr4tI_KzJ

In Supergaande Freestyle strijden Qucee, Nesim, Ta Joela en een gast om wie het creatiefste is met bars. De groep spelen om de kroon in twee rondes: Switch Up en Freestyle.

In Switch Up wordt er een kaart gepakt waarop de lyrics staan van een bekend nummer. Fraasie draait een beat waarop het nummer gebracht moet worden. De rest van de groep moet vervolgens raden om welke track het gaat.

In de final round gaat de groep in Freestyle op basis van een woord zolang mogelijk proberen rappen. De eerste die choked, is eruit.

-----------

Meer video's
STRAATINTERVIEWS: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/Straatinterviews
TALKSHOWS: https://Supergaande.lnk.to/Talkshow

Depuis 2012, de l‚ÄôUkraine √Ý la Centrafrique, via la Syrie, la Libye ou Madagascar, des mercenaires russes du groupe Wagner portent les armes dans des zones o√π la Russie n‚Äôa officiellement envoy√© se battre aucun soldat. D√©couvrez notre nouvelle enqu√™te vid√©o.

Collect√©es puis analys√©es par Le Monde et des enqu√™teurs internationaux, des documents partag√©s en ligne permettent de suivre l‚Äôactivit√© de certains membres du groupe Wagner¬Ý: combats dans le Donbass aupr√®s des prorusses, en Syrie aupr√®s de Bachar Al-Assad, en soutien aux forces du mar√©chal Haftar en Libye, missions de protection du pr√©sident centrafricain‚Ä¶

Cette enqu√™te vid√©o du Monde met √©galement en lumi√®re certains personnages cl√©s dans l‚Äôorganisation et le financement des mercenaires Wagner : du parrain du groupe, l‚Äôoligarque Evgueni Prigojine, proche de Vladimir Poutine, √Ý Dimitri Sytyi, jeune polyglotte pass√© par une √©cole de commerce fran√ßaise, parachut√© dirigeant d‚Äôune entreprise d‚Äôextraction mini√®re en R√©publique centrafricaine.

en.title: Putin's 'ghost army': investigating Wagner Russian mercenaries
en.description:
They train, fight and die in deep secrecy. Since 2012, from Ukraine to the Central African Republic, via Syria, Libya or Madagascar, Russian mercenaries from the Wagner group have been carrying arms in areas where Russia has officially sent no soldiers to fight. Here is our new video investigation.

Collected and analyzed by Le Monde and international investigators, documents shared online make it possible to follow the activity of some members of the Wagner group: fighting in Ukraine with the pro-Russian, in Syria with Bashar Al-Assad, in support of the forces of the Marshal Haftar in Libya, or protecting the President of the Central African Republic ...

This video investigationalso sheds light on some key figures in the organization and financing of Wagner mercenaries: from the group's godfather, the oligarch Yevgeny Prigojine, close to Vladimir Poutine, to Dimitri Sytyi, a young polyglot, parachuted manager of a mining company in the Central African Republic.

If you want to contact us or send us confidential tips, here is our mail: investigation@lemonde.fr

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! üëÄ

PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It‚Äôs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It‚Äôs a vicious cycle.

ŸÄŸÄŸÄŸÄŸÄ
DW Documentary gives you knowledge beyond the headlines. Watch top documentaries from German broadcasters and international production companies. Meet intriguing people, travel to distant lands, get a look behind the complexities of daily life and build a deeper understanding of current affairs and global events. snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: DMX Dead at 50
snippet.description:
DMX has died. The rapper turned 50 in December. His death follows a heart attack he suffered, which was triggered by a drug overdose. Amid DMX‚Äôs hospitalization, a rep for his family told ET that he was in a medical state from which they do not think he will recover. On Monday, a vigil was held by the Ruff Ryders to the Rescue Foundation outside of DMX‚Äôs hospital. The ‚ÄòParty Up‚Äô performer was nominated for three GRAMMY awards, and he won Favorite Rap/Hip-Hop Artist at the American Music Awards in 2000.

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: We Moved Across The Country
snippet.description:
You can check out our new live streaming channel here! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiiY0MsUgNihfAZ2ZgC19lg

Hello friends and welcome to another video! So, late last year we decided to take the plunge and move across the country for a fresh start in a new place. After doing some serious decluttering, we packed up our house, grabbed our cat, and hit the road (and vlogged our whole cross-country road trip in our minivan!) It's been a couple of months and we are finally set up enough to dive back into making videos, so here is our moving vlog! Hopefully you guys enjoy it, and thank you for being so patient with us while we figure all of this out. 

Also, sorry about any smudginess of the windshield! It was tough to keep clean on our drive, but I know sometimes it can look gross, so sorry about that! Lol

This video is NOT sponsored!!

You can check out my Instagram here! https://www.instagram.com/safiyany/‚Äã

MUSIC
Via AudioNetwork

Dans celui-ci, Franck et Bader r√©alisent l'entretien et modifient la moto de l'un de nos abonn√©s dans le besoin. Cette ann√©e, c'est Adrien, possesseur d'une Suzuki V-Strom 1000 de 2007 avec 100 000 km au compteur, qui a √©t√© tir√© au sort. Dans ce premier √©pisode, Franck et Bader vont faire un point sur l'ampleur du chantier et attaquer l'entretien du moteur !

Esti o bucata cazuta din rai,

Ochii diamante,
Tu ma ghidezi in noapte.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande,
Lipeste ma de inima ta.
Fericire-n secunde,
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Ne-am inchis in lumea noastra in dormitor,

Tu esti noaptea mea albastra,
Esti tot ce am mai bun.

Lipeste ma de inima ta

Jumatatea mea mai buna.

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico ‚Äî go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz ‚Äî this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful ‚Äî please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive ‚Äî https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive ‚Äî https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

localized.title: The Secret of Synchronization
localized.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico ‚Äî go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz ‚Äî this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful ‚Äî please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive ‚Äî https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive ‚Äî https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

snippet.title: Mort du prince Philip : quel √©tait le r√¥le du mari de la reine d'Angleterre ?

Philip Mountbatten, le mari de la reine Elizabeth II, est mort. Le prince consort √©tait mari√© √Ý cette derni√®re depuis 1947. Les sp√©cialistes de la couronne et de la famille royale se plaisent √Ý dire que la long√©vit√© de leur couple et son investissement dans ses fonctions publiques en ont fait le sujet le plus fid√®le de la reine.

Le duc d‚ÄôEdimbourg n‚Äôa jamais acc√©d√© au titre de roi car, dans la monarchie britannique, un mari ne peut pas h√©riter du titre de sa femme. Il partageait cependant avec cette derni√®re un parent commun : la reine Victoria.

Dans la monarchie, cet ancien officier de marine a essentiellement eu un r√¥le de repr√©sentation publique. Il aimait d‚Äôailleurs se pr√©senter comme ¬´ le d√©voileur de plaques le plus exp√©riment√© du monde ¬ª, lors des inaugurations. Le 2 ao√ªt 2017, il effectuait sa derni√®re repr√©sentation publique et prenait sa retraite. Une premi√®re pour un prince consort.

snippet.title: LEERLINGEN KOMEN IN OPSTAND OMDAT DE LERAAR ZICH ALS DICTATOR GEDRAAGT
snippet.description:
De leraar deelt de cijfers uit van de toets van afgelopen week. De klas heeft verdacht hoog gescoord en meneer Hoefnagels vertrouwt de boel niet meer! Peter verdenkt de klas van fraude en wilt de toetst overdoen. De leerlingen zijn boos en protesteren het besluit. ABONNEER NU: http://goo.gl/trlgKy

TOP 10 VIDEO'S: http://goo.gl/tklSzV
#peterhoefnagels #deklasvanhoefnagels #toets

00:00 De toets is nagekeken!
00:33 Teveel tienen?
01:00 Hoe is dit mogelijk?
01:30 Goed en slecht nieuws
02:10 Dit kunt u niet maken!
02:50 Mijn vertrouwen is geschonden
03:40 Wij gaan naar Mulder!
04:30 Dans wedstrijd Mr. Hoefnagels Tegen Toss
05:30 Hoefnagels heeft een steekje los zitten

Vrienden worden?
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/peterhoefnagelsofficial/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/peter.hoefnagels.1
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MrHoefnagels
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@deklasvanhoefnagels

Bekijk alle afleveringen hier:
Seizoen 1  - http://goo.gl/MgqsGt
Seizoen 2 - http://goo.gl/WUL6Zc
Seizoen 3
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLA5WtKevhDbVPfUq8Zm18mUX2cL5LhnzZ
Seizoen4-https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLA5WtKevhDbVl1BRc6rIdiSmNcb2J9oGx

--Welkom in mijn klas! Ik ben Peter Hoefnagels ook wel bekend als Mr. Hoefnagels. Ik ben leraar Nederlands. Ik geef les aan een multiculturele klas. Elke woensdag om 19.00 een nieuwe video. Ik behandel alle problemen die je tegenkomt op een middelbare school. Hoe dagen de leerlingen de leraar uit ? Hoe gaan ze met pesten om? Waarom spijbelen leerlingen? Waarom komen ze te laat in de klas? Welke smoesjes hebben ze dan ? Hoe doen ze hun huiswerk? Welk strafwerk vinden ze erg? Waarom worden ze eruit gestuurd? Er wordt veel gelachen en gehuild in de klas. Soms haten de leerlingen de leraar maar meestal is er wederzijds respect. 

Ben je student of leraar en herken je jezelf in deze? - Abonneer je nu voor meer video's!

snippet.title: Chelsea krijgt pandoering in eigen huis - Premier League: hoogtepunten speeldag 30
snippet.description:
West Brom ging verrassend winnen op Stamford Bridge met overtuigende cijfers. City won dan weer de topper tegen Leicester dankzij een sterke De Bruyne. Daarnaast kon Liverpool nog eens overtuigend winnen op bezoek bij Arsenal en zo sluipen de Reds weer dichter bij de top 4. United versloeg in eigen huis Brighton.

Taner bunu duyunca ne yapacaƒüƒ±nƒ± bilemez. Dilek'ten annesinin rƒ±za g√∂stermediƒüini gizler ve bir √ß√∂z√ºm arayƒ±≈üƒ±na girer. Tek √ß√∂z√ºm Halime'nin fikrini deƒüi≈ütirip rƒ±za g√∂stermesidir. ƒ∞zlerken ya≈üayacak, hissedecek, duygulanacak ve g√∂n√ºlden baƒülanacaksƒ±nƒ±z...

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Wednesday, April 7 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 12:34 p.m. EDT, or 16:34 UTC, and a backup opportunity is available on Thursday, April 8 at 12:12 p.m. EDT, or 16:12 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously supported launch of NASA astronauts Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley to the International Space Station, ANASIS-II, CRS-21, Transporter-1, and two Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚Äù droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9‚Äôs fairing prevouisly supported launch of AMOS-17 and two Starlink missions, and the other previously supported a Starlink mission.

snippet.title: Burger : les dessous d'un plat mythique
snippet.description:
Il se mange tous les ans 1,7 milliards de hamburgers en France. Cela fait 50 burgers par seconde. Pendant longtemps le fameux steak hach√© pur boeuf coinc√© entre deux tranches de pain a √©t√© l‚Äôapanage des fast food et de la junk food. Vite fait, parfois mal fait, gras, sucr√©, calorique, standardis√©, sa qualit√© principale √©tait son prix.

Tout a chang√© aujourd‚Äôhui. Son prix d‚Äôabord. Entre 10 et 15 euros la pi√®ce dans les brasseries et restaurants, parfois jusqu‚Äô√Ý 50 ou 60 euros dans certains palaces qui se font une coquetterie d‚Äôen servir. Sa composition ensuite. Il est fabriqu√© √Ý base de produits frais et peut √™tre agr√©ment√© de multiples ingr√©dients, l√©gumes, fruits, √©pices. Il peut aussi √™tre assaisonn√© de sauces improbables ou accompagn√© de buns aux recettes toujours plus inventives. Bref le hamburger est de moins en moins am√©ricain, de plus en plus fran√ßais, ou asiatique. Des restaurants proposent m√™me depuis peu des burgers sans viande, √Ý base de steak hach√© de synth√®se.

Mais attention. Les propositions ne sont pas toutes exemptes de critiques. Rien de plus facile que de lancer un restaurant de hamburger √Ý prix modique sans le moindre talent. Nous d√©couvrirons aussi que l‚Äôune des meilleures adresses de Paris n‚Äôest pas un restaurant, mais une √©choppe de rue. Comme si le burger revenait √Ý sa nature profonde, la street food.

R√©alisation :  C√©line Dest√®ve

Suivez-nous sur Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/FoodStoryFR

snippet.title: KSI and Little Mix‚Äôs Jade Thirlwall rock Bake Off! | The Great Stand Up To Cancer Bake Off
snippet.description:
Watch more classic celebrity moments from the Bake Off archive: https://bit.ly/MoreBakeOff 

Internet celebrity KSI and Little Mix star Jade Thirlwall trade the boxing ring and the music studio for the Bake Off Tent, alongside comedian Katherine Ryan and documentary maker Stacey Dooley in aid of Stand Up To Cancer. Will KSI's fondant fancies deliver a knockout blow in the signature, or will Jade's latticed cherry pie create a 'sweet melody' in the technical? As for their 'What I Cannot Live Without' biscuit & meringue scene showstoppers, they truly have to be seen to be believed... 
 
#GBBO‚Äã #CelebBakeOff‚Äã #BakeOff‚Äã #KSI #JadeThirlwall

SUBSCRIBE for weekly videos: https://bit.ly/BakeOffonYouTube‚Äã 
CATCH UP with the latest series on Channel 4's All 4: https://bit.ly/SU2CBakeOffonAll4‚Äã

GIVE DOUGH A GO: 
Try out the Technical Challenge recipe attempted by the celebs: https://bit.ly/GBBOCherryPie

LIKE AND FOLLOW:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/BakeOffFacebook‚Äã 
Twitter: https://bit.ly/BakeOffTwitter‚Äã 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/BakeOffInstagram‚Äã 
Official Website: https://bit.ly/BakeOffWebsite‚Äã 

ABOUT BAKE OFF:
The Great British Bake Off is the ultimate baking battle where passionate amateur baking fans compete to be crowned the UK‚Äôs Best Amateur Baker. 

ABOUT THE GREAT STAND UP TO CANCER BAKE OFF:
The Great British Bake Off welcomes an array of famous faces into the Tent to battle it out for the coveted Star Baker apron in aid of Stand Up To Cancer. In each episode, the celebrities tackle Signature, Technical and Showstopper challenges - all under the watchful eyes of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith.

snippet.title: Appa - Bij Andy in de auto! (English subtitles)
snippet.description:
Appa bij Andy in de auto! Rachid El Ghazaoui beter bekend als Appa. Rapper en maatschappelijk ondernemer, met een vocabulaire waar je u tegen zegt. Met zijn diepzinnige en politiek geladen teksten, is hij een absolute rap icoon, die al sinds 2001 zijn strepen heeft verdiend. Relaxte en slimme gozer, die zich geweldig inzet voor de jeugd. Mooi om deze Topper in de auto te hebben. 

Word lid van dit kanaal en krijg toegang tot speciale voordelen:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvFmO93LlI2K21nZOUwjwfA/join

Volg me op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/andyvandermeijde7/

Bij Andy in de auto is vanaf nu ook te beluisteren als Podcast!
https://open.spotify.com/show/2rb6gsVY2ujkO3wrxuY7UP?si=breKCFcrTQOqBGXwVVychA

Produced by Eye Legacy

snippet.title: Que cachent les pizzas industrielles ?
snippet.description:

snippet.title: We BUILT a Mandalorian JETPACK! (HACKLORIAN: CHAPTER 5)
snippet.description:
Download and play AFK Arena: https://patron.me/HacksmithAFK Join AFK Arena's 2nd anniversary event: April 6th to May 5th and get 100 free summons and 1 special gift code: aaz27uvgfi
OUR NEW SHIRT ‚ñ∫ https://hacksmith.store/collections/special-offers/products/the-hacklorian-t-shirt

In our HACKLORIAN series, we'll be making all of Mando's gadgets, armor, and weapons! Make sure to become a YouTube member to see the videos before anyone else! Next up... Grapple gun!

Check out the circuit diagram at Maker.IO ‚ñ∫ https://www.digikey.com/en/maker/projects/the-hacksmith-building-a-mandalorian-jetpack/054d24f65f574fcc8cfb0b90b6d26f6f

Watch the Mandalorian on Disney+ ‚ñ∫ https://www.disneyplus.com/sign-up

Watch the whole Hacklorian Series Playlist ‚ñ∫ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX8192MVmd8&list=PLbncXbXlaNQcxSSb0THFDaDy_C_ojvYig

Check out JLCPCB for all your PCB needs! ‚ñ∫ https://jlcpcb.com/RHS

Become a Hacksmith member get exclusive perks! ‚ñ∫ https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjgpFI5dU-D1-kh9H1muoxQ/join
‚ñ∫Early video access 
‚ñ∫Project design files (solidworks)
‚ñ∫Merch Discounts 
‚ñ∫Collaborate with us on our videos 

SOCIAL
Website ‚ñ∫ http://www.hacksmith.tech
Facebook ‚ñ∫ http://www.facebook.com/thehacksmith
Instagram ‚ñ∫ http://www.instagram.com/thehacksmith
Twitter ‚ñ∫ http://twitter.com/thehacksmith
Patreon ‚ñ∫ http://www.patreon.com/thehacksmith
Discord ‚ñ∫ https://discordapp.com/invite/thehacksmith 
Merch ‚ñ∫ https://www.hacksmith.store

CHAPTERS: 
0:00 Intro
2:00 Our Jetpack Components
3:24 James and Bogdan Talk Design
6:48 Cross Vectoring Jets!
7:30 Mounting The Components
8:20 Build a PCB!
9:22 The Jetpack Cover
13:03 Does It Work With The Costume?
13:45 Final Assembly
16:29 Outro

MUSIC CREDITS:
Big thank you to Samuel Kim Music for the epic music!
https://www.youtube.com/c/samuelkimmusic 
https://twitter.com/samuelkimmusic 
https://www.instagram.com/samuelkimmusic

SOFTWARE:
PCB Design ‚ñ∫ https://www.altium.com/yt/TheHacksmith
Video Review / Collaboration ‚ñ∫ http://r.frame.io/pZq3N
Video Editing ‚ñ∫ Adobe Premiere 
CAD ‚ñ∫ Solidworks 
CAM ‚ñ∫ Autodesk HSM http://bit.ly/HSMworks

CAMERA GEAR:
Highspeed Cam - Chronos 1.4 ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/chronosCam
Main shooter - Panasonic GH5s ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2Fjd80N 
Phone - Samsung S10  ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2N8FOh8
Camcorder - Sony Handycam ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2FDnq81 
Action Cam - GoPro ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2FxXDC4 
Steadicam - Removu K1 ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2N9lDQq 
Main mic - Sennheiser ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2DsR8ec
Bendy Tripod ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2FyLNb0 
Main Tripods - old second hand Manfrotto tripods no longer sold. 
Studio Light - Luxli ‚ñ∫ https://bhpho.to/2N9SPav

TOOLS / MACHINES: 
CNC Mill - Tormach 1100MX ‚ñ∫ https://hubs.ly/H0B8DWG0
CNC Mill - Tormach PCNC 440 ‚ñ∫ https://hubs.ly/H0B8DYk0
CNC Lathe - Tormach 15L ‚ñ∫ https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gcp0
Autofeed Bandsaw - Tormach AF50 ‚ñ∫ https://hubs.ly/H0B8Gj10
CNC Waterjet Cutter ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/wazerJet
CNC Plasma Cutter ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/EMTplasma
3d Printers ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/H1Printer
Laser Cutter - Gweike LG900N 80W ‚ñ∫ http://lmgtfy.com/?q=lg900n 
3d Scanner ‚ñ∫ http://amzn.to/2pwbvTu
Drills, drivers, grinders, saws, etc ‚ñ∫ http://amzn.to/2p9SPJ3 
Mig Welder ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/MP250iWelder
Tig Welder ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/Tig200Welder
Quiet Air Compressor ‚ñ∫ http://bit.ly/38zVKzB
Desktop PC ‚ñ∫ https://youtu.be/gSbt3LK8hCs 
Oscilloscope ‚ñ∫ https://bit.ly/38sOzKw
Multimeters ‚ñ∫ https://bit.ly/2WKwPEQ

Purchases made through some store links may provide some compensation to Hacksmith.

snippet.title: I Finally Got My Own Show | Dixie D'Amelio
snippet.description:
I'M BACK!!!! The Early Late Night Show returns bigger and better than ever!! I'm so excited to air this second season of my talk show. It's all because of you that the Dixie D'Amelio Show evolved into this. We have some awesome episodes and amazing guests this season I cannot wait for you to see! Every Sunday at 10AM PST/1PM EST!!! Thanks for watching! 

Credits
Executive Producer: Dixie D'Amelio
Executive Producer: Tommy Burns
Executive Producer: Christian Guiton
Director: Christian Guiton
DP: Seth Fuller
Editor/VFX: Luke Knezevic
Editor: Diego Cole
Production Company: Black Street Entertainment
Studio: Hubble Studio
